problem id: 7fae2ece
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHL(1)

examples:
  01111001 -> 11000010
  01111111 -> 11111010
  01101111 -> 01011010
  01011001 -> 10000010
  11001111 -> 00011110
  11111110 -> 11110100
  10111010 -> 01010100
  11111010 -> 11010100
  00010110 -> 00100000
  00011010 -> 00010000

query: 11101111
predicted answer: 01011110
